channel.title: Occidental Square Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Occidental Square Events

item.title: Mariners Opening Day Celebration at Occidental Square
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Occidental Square, 117 S Washington St., Seattle, WA undefined

Are you ready for some baseball? We are! Join us for some pregame fun ahead of the Mariners home opener on Thursday, March 26. We’re kicking off the season with free giveaways, Wiffle ball, a caricature artist and more at Occidental Square. Festivities start at 3 p.m. ahead of the 7:10 p.m. game. Event image: https://downtownseattle.org/app/uploads/2025/03/events-mariners-home-opener.png

Event details
